commands.hard_fail_later: TODO(#1113): Wire addendum propagation as report-only or hard-fail only after the tracker update workflow is owner-approved per ADR-043 section 2.6.
commands.manual_note: Help-only probe: normal addendum_propagate execution writes tracker rows and is intentionally not run without an addendum target.
commands.name: addendum_propagate_help_probe
commands.stdout:
usage: addendum_propagate.py [-h] [--tracker TRACKER] addendum

Insert implementation-tracker rows for ADR addendum frontmatter.

positional arguments:
  addendum

options:
  -h, --help         show this help message and exit
  --tracker TRACKER
